faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Yonkers typically range from $550 to $5,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. Minor infestations in single rooms start at the lower end, while whole-home treatments for severe cases require more comprehensive service. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Yonkers properties.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Yonkers home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small irregular holes in wool clothing, carpets, or upholstery; silky tubes or cases in closet corners; adult moths flying near wardrobes (especially in spring and fall); and webbing on fabric surfaces. You may also notice larvae (small cream-colored caterpillars) on clothing or damage to stored blankets, sweaters, and other natural fiber items.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Our treatments target clothes moth larvae and adults while minimizing exposure to living areas. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during treatment, and most clients can return to treated areas within a few hours.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Yonkers locations, understanding that clothes moths can cause ongoing damage to your valuable belongings.
